dreamDEX Agent

Agent Control — Main orchestrator · $7–$15
BAL LOW • CAPITAL FLOOR HIT
Wallet USDso: $--
Need $-- more to reach the $35 floor
Top up the wallet and the agent will resume on its next tick.
Pace
Mode
Max Orders
Main — current state
Awaiting state...
Micro — sub-agent — · profit · $2–$5
Awaiting first orchestrated decision…
Burst loops two independent producers driving /manual + direct-RPC
REST — /manual — · — · —
Awaiting first burst fill…
Hybrid: REST builds tx, RPC broadcasts. Auto-restarts via cron every 5 min. Stable fallback.
Direct — RPC only — · — · —
Not running.
Builds + signs + broadcasts entirely in-process. ~5× faster than REST when active.
Portfolio & Liquidity Breakdown STALE DATA
Total Value (all buckets)
$--.--
Wallet USDso + Vault USDso + Native SOMI at mid-price.
Real PnL (all buckets)
$--.-- (0.0%)
Internal valuation = wallet USDso + vault + base inventory @ mid + native @ mid − $50. The leaderboard's wallet-only PnL is shown only for rank purposes.
Volume / Fills
$--.--
-- fills / -- txs sent
Bucket
Value
What this is
USDso wallet
$--.--
Sits in your EOA. This is what the leaderboard counts as your PnL. Buys spend from here, sells return here.
USDso pool vaults
$--.--
Held inside dreamDEX pools. Not lost — just trapped. The agent auto-drains this back to wallet after every successful sell. You can also drain manually below.
Native SOMI
--.----
Gas reserve + occasional trading inventory. Used as msg.value when you sell SOMI directly. Not counted in contest PnL.
Manual reserve
$20.00
Informational tag only — the original $50 was split into $30 agent / $20 manual. The chain doesn't separate these; the agent considers everything available above the $35 floor.
Manual Override — Wallet-funded swap
Fires a single order from your wallet (not the agent loop). BUY = spend USDso wallet → receive base token to wallet. SELL = spend base token from wallet → receive USDso back. Amount is sized in USDso; we convert at live mid-price.
Activity Log agent decisions · fills · commands
Vault Ops — Move tokens between wallet ↔ pool vault
DEPOSIT = wallet → pool vault (pre-fund vault-style orders; rarely needed since the agent uses wallet funding). WITHDRAW = pool vault → wallet (pulls stranded vault USDso/base back so it counts on the leaderboard). Use this if something ever gets stuck.
Loading vault data...
https:// EOA: 0xF4c8...905
Pings: --/--/--
Authentication Required

Enter the Flask API Key from the backend .env file to execute mutations.

Confirm Action

This action executes on-chain and uses real assets.

Emergency Stop & Wipe Runbook

Run these commands manually on the deployment server to force halt and wipe state.

ssh user@<SERVER_HOST>
cd ~/dreamdex-agent
docker compose down
docker rmi dreamdex-agent:latest
shred -u .env
cd ~ && rm -rf ~/dreamdex-agent
